Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Demetrios Dimitiou
Off Calendar Dec-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Douglas Moore, Esq. 510-893-6300 for Plaintiff.
Nicholas K. Jay, Esq. 415-788-7300 for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling was contested late and there is no Opposition filed on the merits. Defendant argues/asks questions. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BATROA PROFIT SHARING PLAN, MICHAEL LEVINE'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Demetrios Dimitriou.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiffs' application for a right to attach order and order for issuance of writ of attachment is granted. Defendant has not filed any evidence in support of his late-filed opposition to the application. Allegations in an unverified pleading and factual assertions by counsel do not constitute evidence.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Continued To Jan-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Demetrios Dimitiou
Off Calendar Nov-21-2019 Continued To Dec-30-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Moore, Esq. of the Law Office of John Douglas Moore, T:510.893.6300, for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Hearing was required. Plaintiff's counsel represented to the Court that the parties have stipulated to continue the hearing, and for the Court to sign the Temporary Protective order. Parties also stipulated that the bond be set at $0.00. After hearing,

PLAINTIFFS BATROA PROFIT SHARING PLAN, MICHAEL LEVINE's Application For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Demetrios Dimitiou is continued to December 30, 2019 at 9:30am in Department 302. If there is a need for further continuance, parties are to inform the Court at least 2 days prior to the hearing date.

The Court signed the stipulated Temporary Protective Order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org

Motion To Compel Written Responses To Rpds And Production Of Documents, Deem Admitted Requests For Admissions, And Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories From Dimitriou And Associates, P.C. And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Helbraun, Esq. 415-982-4000 of Helbraun Law Firm for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff reports the dismissal was on the Cross-Complaint and the motion calendared is on the wrong case number. This motion should have been on case CGC-17-556907. The Court indicates it was presented with the dismissal, has not reviewed the papers and will recuse itself. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BATROA PROFIT SHARING PLAN, MICHAEL LEVINE's Motion To Compel Written Responses To Rpds And Production Of Documents, Deem Admitted Requests For Admissions, And Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories From Dimitriou And Associates, P.C. And For Sanctions.

Continued to 8/28/19. Counsel to give notice to the Opposing Side.***

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

***Due to a clerical error, the motion was calendared on the wrong case number. The motion should have been calendared on the correct case number CGC-17-556907.***
